rulings.Case Title: LI FU YAO ET AL VS. PETER SO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 13, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFFS LI FU YAO, LI WANG, QING YING LIN'S Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint. GRANTED subject to the following: (1) There appears to be an error in the caption of the proposed First Amended Complaint with regards to the Seventeenth Cause of Action. Plaintiff shall file a supplemental declaration with a corrected FAC prior to the hearing; (2) Plaintiff shall file an application for Guardian ad litum for Wen-Qi Li prior to the hearing. =(501/REQ)
